decisions.briefing: Markets are broadly positive today with both NASDAQ and S&P 500 up 0.6% in a clean risk-on session — ideal conditions for deploying the idle cash sitting in four open slots. I'm filling all four with score-95 momentum candidates (ACHR, FLY, LUNR, RKLB) that have RSI in the ideal 55–70 zone, avoiding the overbought crowd at RSI 80–90 which carries higher reversal risk. Existing six positions remain untouched as none have triggered stop-loss or profit-target thresholds.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities advanced broadly today with NASDAQ and S&P 500 each gaining 0.6%, reflecting a risk-on posture as investors rotated into growth and technology names. Semiconductor and aerospace/defense stocks led sector gains, consistent with improving macro sentiment and easing concerns over trade policy headwinds. The broad-based nature of the rally — with few sectors declining — suggests institutional participation rather than short-covering, making momentum signals more reliable today.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日普遍上漲，那斯達克指數與標普500指數均上升0.6%，反映市場情緒轉趨風險偏好。半導體及航太國防類股領漲，與整體宏觀情緒改善及貿易政策憂慮緩和的背景相符。此次漲勢涵蓋多個板塊，顯示有機構資金積極進場，而非純粹空頭回補，動能信號的可靠性因此提升。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) measures how fast a stock is moving up or down on a scale of 0–100. A reading between 55 and 70 is the 'sweet spot' — the stock has strong upward momentum but isn't yet overbought, meaning buyers are still in control with room to run. Today's top buys (ACHR, FLY, LUNR, RKLB) all sit in this zone, which is why they scored 95 over the overbought names like RGTI and QBTS sitting above 90.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）衡量股票上漲或下跌的速度，數值介於0至100之間。當RSI落在55至70的區間，代表股票處於「動能甜蜜點」——上升勢頭強勁，但尚未進入超買區域，意味著買方仍主導市場且仍有上升空間。今日買入的標的（ACHR、FLY、LUNR、RKLB）均處於此區間，這也是它們比RSI高達90以上的RGTI、QBTS等超買股票評分更高的原因。
